title: Antimatter
body:
此mod为游戏添加了一些很强大的武器及工具。
此mod兼容性较差，若有bug请向作者反馈。

mod中的反物质为本mod的主要物品，虽然有那么一些不科学。。。
mod中添加的反物质神剑基本可以秒杀任何生物（包括原版及一些mod）.
以下为英文文本，纯粹的机翻：

This mod adds some powerful weapons and tools to the game. 
This mod has poor compatibility.
 If there is a bug, please report it to the author.
 Antimatter in mod is the main object of mod, although there are some unscientific things...
 The antimatter sword added in mod can basically kill any creature (including the original and some mod).
